headline: How The MercadoLibre (MELI) Story Is Shifting As Investment And Margin Expectations Reset
summary: MercadoLibre’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$2,805.46 to US$2,639.69, signaling a modest reset in the price target narrative. Recent research ties this adjustment to a more cautious stance on margins and competition, even as many analysts still highlight long term execution potential and the impact of the current investment cycle. As you read on, you will see how these evolving views can help you track the story and frame your own expectations over time. Analyst Price...

headline: Morgan Stanley Tests Private Credit Liquidity As AI Risks Surface
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has limited investor withdrawals from its North Haven Private Income Fund following a surge in redemption requests. The firm has also flagged rising default risks in private credit that it links to AI driven disruption in the software sector. Both developments point to tighter liquidity conditions and changing risk appetite in parts of the private credit market. Morgan Stanley, a global investment bank and wealth manager, has been expanding its presence in private...
